user.title: Set up Sunseeker Local MQTT
user.description:
Please enter your mower's Device ID.

**Where to find it?**
1. On the physical sticker on your mower (usually a 20-character Serial Number).
2. In the official Sunseeker/whitelabel mobile app under Device Info.
3. By monitoring your local MQTT broker traffic (look for `device/YOUR_ID/update`).
